---
name: 🐛 Bug Report
about: Report something that's broken
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
---

## What broke

A clear, one-paragraph description of the issue.

## Reproduction steps

1.
2.
3.

## Expected behavior

What should have happened.

## Actual behavior

What actually happened. Include full error text (not screenshots — text is searchable).

## Environment

- OS: (e.g. Windows 11 Pro 25H2)
- Claude Code version: (output of `claude --version`)
- PowerShell version: (output of `$PSVersionTable.PSVersion`)
- Profile used: (web-app / trading-terminal / gov-44fz-bot / base)

## Logs

If applicable, attach:
- `LAB_JOURNAL.md` last 10 lines
- `RESEARCH_LOG.md` relevant section
- Output of `claude /doctor`
